ValidationRule.description: Only users with the Sales Manager role or System Administrator profile can check the Manager Approved box.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED(Manager_Approved__c) ), Manager_Approved__c = true, $UserRole.Name <> 'Sales Manager', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only a Sales Manager can approve events with a Quoted Price above 500,000.
